title: dillandia subumbellata
intro: Dillandia subumbellata is a rare and lesser-known plant species that belongs to the family of flowering plants. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Dillandia subumbellata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Traditionally, it is prepared as a tea or infusion for its medicinal uses, and in some herbal practices, it is also used in tincture or oil form to harness its benefits.
